goal: Create a real-time deployment monitoring dashboard
summary:
Phase 5 complete. Built the Deployment Center:

1. src/services/DeploymentService.ts — Tracks deployment state with getStatus() (currentStatus, lastPublished, lastDeployment, websiteUrl, repoUrl, stats, publishingQueue), addLog/getLogs ring buffer, getCommitHistory() via GitService, deriveWebsiteUrl() with user/org site detection.
2. src/components/DeploymentCenter.tsx — Status cards (Current Status, Total Published, Pending, Failed), Last Published card, Publishing Queue with expandable step timeline, Quick Links (Website/Repo), Recent Commits panel. Polls every 5s for real-time updates. Error state with retry. Loading skeleton.
3. SSE already in place from Phase 4 — /api/publish/:jobId/progress endpoint with EventSource.
4. Admin.tsx integration — 'deployment' view state, header navigation button, back button, main rendering conditional.
5. API endpoints — GET /api/deploy/status, GET /api/deploy/commits.

TypeScript compiles. Runtime verified: DeploymentService returns correct websiteUrl 'https://arbabmujtaba.github.io/' and repoUrl from git remote.
stepSummaries:
1. Create DeploymentService.ts with deployment state tracking and status parsing [verified]
  2. Build DeploymentCenter.tsx with status cards, timeline, and queue [verified]
  3. Implement polling or SSE for real-time deployment updates [verified]
  4. Integrate Deployment Center into admin navigation [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: All 4 steps had real verification: Step 1 via tsx runtime test of getStatus(). Step 2 via TypeScript compilation of DeploymentCenter.tsx component. Step 3 via code inspection of polling interval and SSE headers. Step 4 via grep confirming integration points in Admin.tsx and tsc compilation.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1: DeploymentService getStatus tested via tsx. Step 2: tsc passes for DeploymentCenter.tsx. Step 3: setInterval(loadData, 5000) confirmed + SSE endpoint with text/event-stream. Step 4: Admin.tsx viewState 'deployment', header button, rendering conditional.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal: create real-time deployment monitoring dashboard. Artifacts: DeploymentService, DeploymentCenter component, polling, SSE, integration, API endpoints. All confirmed present and compiling.
gateVerdicts.evidence: src/services/DeploymentService.ts, src/components/DeploymentCenter.tsx, server.ts endpoints /api/deploy/status + /api/deploy/commits, Admin.tsx integration.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred. Phase 5 scope fully implemented: deployment state tracking, status cards, timeline, queue, polling/SSE, admin navigation all complete.
gateVerdicts.evidence: All 4 steps completed. No features left undone.
